title: lepidium corsicum
intro: Lepidium corsicum, also known as Corsican cress or mountain pepper, is a plant species in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that is native to the European Alps. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lepidium corsicum include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and act as an expectorant to help relieve respiratory issues. Lepidium corsicum can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
